bird.name: 非洲秧鸡
bird.summary: 非洲秧鸡（台湾作非洲長腳秧雞，学名：Crecopsis egregia）是鹤形目秧鸡科非洲秧鸡属（学名：Crecopsis）的唯一一种鸟类。 非洲秧鸡体重约119克，翼长约121.2毫米，嘴峰长约25.1毫米，喙宽度约3.6毫米，喙厚度约6.9毫米，跗蹠长约43毫米，尾长约38…

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: This species nests in a wide variety of grassland types, and agricultural land with tall crops may also be used
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: alt=tall grass with trees in the distance|thumb|African grassland, ideal African crake habitat The African crake occurs throughout sub-Saharan Africa from Senegal east to Kenya, and south to KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa, except in arid areas of south and southwest Africa where the annual summer rainfall is less than
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: Nearly all the South Africa population of about 8,000 birds occur in KwaZulu-Natal and the former Transvaal Province, and much good habitat is protected in the Kruger National Park and iSimangaliso Wetland Park
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: Even in southern Africa, some birds may stay after breeding if enough usable habitat remains. The habitat is predominantly grassland, ranging from wetland edges and seasonal marshes to savanna, lightly wooded dry grassland, and grassy forest clearings
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: Even in southern Africa, some birds may stay after breeding if enough usable habitat remains. The habitat is predominantly grassland, ranging from wetland edges and seasonal marshes to savanna, lightly wooded dry grassland, and grassy forest clearings
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: Its grassland habitat is frequently burned in the dry season, forcing the birds to move elsewhere. In an East African study, the average area occupied by one bird was when breeding, and at other times. The highest densities occur in lush or moist grassland such as the Okavango Delta
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 非洲秧鸡
relations.evidence: Although it may be displaced temporarily by the burning of grassland, or permanently by agriculture, wetland drainage or urbanisation, its large range and population mean that it is not considered to be threatened
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
